programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on sour sauces! First a brown butter picatta sauce for chicken picatta! Next, a smoked tomato ponzu sauce for fried oysters and a duo of orange marmalade and lemon curd for crepes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on veggie sauces! First up, a Provencal sauce tomate to go with halibut! Next, a rustic pepperonata with flank steak and a trio of pestos!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on salty, funky sauces! First up, a gorgonzola-prosciutto-orange wine pasta sauce! Next, a grape and olive tapenade to go with quail and sauce brandade for potatoes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on sweet sauces! First up, a grown-up sundae with classic chocolate sauce! Next, a caramelized onion soubise for pork chops and a traditional sweet and sour chicken sauce!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Warm host Jessica McGovern offers up some do-it-yourself recipes that will spice up any wedding.

programme.title: Flour Power

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Picnics are fun, elegant, and filled with delicious food! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourite picnic-ready desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us how to make delightful breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Smiling host Vanessa Gianfrancesco loves Bread for Brunch and so will you! In this episode she shares mouthwatering mid-morning bread recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Charming host Vanessa is your host for this Dim Sum episode -- try your hand at dumplings, congee and more!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Fun host Vanessa answers the question "Where should I cook for brunch today?" Join her for Brunch Around The World!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: What do they eat for brunch in the Middle East? Friendly host Vanessa is excited to show you with these tasty recipes!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on bitter sauces! First up, a duo of chimichurris - one with black garlic! Next, a stout and espresso gravy for lamb and a traditional Georgian walnut sauce!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on fatty sauces! First up, patatas bravas with aioli and brava sauce! Next, classic sauce choron on crab cakes and a duck fat-blood orange emulsion with duck confit!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on creamy sauces! First a duo of creamy butter sauces with salmon! Next up a sauce créme with beef tenderloin and a vegan coconut créme anglaise!

programme.title: The Wizard Of Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford pulls back the curtain on savoury sauces! First up, a soy-miso-honey sauce for seared duck breast! Next, a black demi-glace for hanger steak and a sauce duxelles for scallops!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Surprise! Host Jessica McGovern uses unusual surprise ingredients in three delicious desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Summertime is all about being outdoors and fun host Jessica McGovern whips up some sweet treats that are perfect for a summer pool party.

programme.title: Higher with Isaac Pitre
programme.desc: Isaac Pitre seeks to equip the believer in Christ to live life on the highest level possible through revelatory teaching and prophectic insight.

programme.title: Jerusalem Dateline
programme.desc: Jerusalem Bureau Chief Chris Mitchell provides first-hand coverage of news and events in the State of Israel from a biblical perspective.

programme.title: Israel Now News
programme.desc: The correspondents highlight news surrounding the nation of Israel, covering everything from current events and politics to social issues and much more.

programme.title: Land of the Bible
programme.desc: Expert guides and scholars bring Israel's Biblical history to life through ancient sites, archaeological discoveries, and modern developments.

programme.title: Your Miraculous Life With Dr. Kynan Bridges
programme.desc: Dr. Kynan Bridges reveals how to operate in miracles, signs and wonders, while learning to see world events through the eyes of scripture.

programme.title: Christian Worship Hour
programme.desc: A South Dakota ministry seeks to minister the word of God to those who are unable to attend traditional church services.

programme.title: Tim Timberlake
programme.desc: We continue to journey through Acts 7 as Stephen highlights the life of Moses to reveal a countercultural truth.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Prominent Christian minister Rod Parsley, of the Pentecostal World Harvest Church in Columbus, Ohio, delivers powerful biblical messages.

programme.title: Larry & Tiz Huch
programme.desc: Pastor Larry Huch instructs viewers on how to enter into a realm of blessing and revelation through the studies of the Jewish roots of the Christian faith.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus
programme.desc: Rabbi Schneider uncovers the final lessons Jesus gave His disciples in the days leading up to the cross and how they speak directly to everyday struggles.

programme.title: Gospel Music Showcase
programme.desc: Host Guy Penrod introduces The Pine Ridge Boys, a southern gospel quartet with a classic sound.

programme.title: Play the Flute
programme.desc: A youth pastor that has recently become the leader of a new youth group tries to reach his students by getting them to read the Word of God.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Watch Rick Renner's in-depth, engaging Bible teaching, using the Greek text to help listeners gain new insight from God's Word.

programme.title: Kenneth W. Hagin
programme.desc: Pastor Kenneth Hagin presents viewers and congregants with an inspired message and music from Rhema Bible Church in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

programme.title: PSB Prophetic Sound Broadcast with Shawn Baker
programme.desc: Pastor Shawn Baker challenges any and all to get closer to God and to learn how to embrace the life that He has prepared for every single person.

programme.title: In Touch with Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: In Touch Ministries is the broadcast teaching ministry of Dr. Charles Stanley.

programme.title: Prophecy USA
programme.desc: ProphecyUSA host Rick Pearson explains the dramatic results that the 4 riders of the apocalypse will have on the USA.

programme.title: Manna-fest with Perry Stone
programme.desc: Perry Stone provides a program dealing with the predictive and sensible studies of God's Word, helping to get a better understanding of biblical prophecy.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus
programme.desc: Rabbi Schneider unpacks the Book of James to reveal how true faith expresses itself through humility, self-control, and surrendered speech.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack La Verdad Del Evangelio
programme.desc: Andrew Wommack comparte cómo la Palabra de Dios transformó su vida. Él cree que el mismo poder puede obrar para ti.

programme.title: Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: El Dr. David Jeremiah, pastor principal de Shadow Mountain Community Church en El Cajon, California, entrega la Palabra de Dios a un mundo en constante cambio.

programme.title: El Programa de John Ankerberg
programme.desc: Un ministerio de televisión y medios de comunicación comprometido con la defensa de la fe cristiana, que anima al creyente y desafía al escéptico.

programme.title: Sid Roth - ¡Es Sobrenatural!
programme.desc: Jon y Jolene Hamill dicen que no nos estamos acercando al fin de los tiempos, sino que estamos en él, y que el tiempo avanza.

programme.title: Jason Lozano
programme.desc: La misión es llevar el mensaje de libertad a las naciones. A través de ganar almas y hacer discípulos podemos ayudar a las naciones a hacer una vida de libertad

programme.title: Impactando las Naciones
programme.desc: En Impactando Naciones, la Pastora Wanda Rolón comparte mensajes de fe, esperanza y poder espiritual para transformar vidas, familias y comunidades.

programme.title: Descubriendo al Jesús Judío
programme.desc: El Rabino Schneider, un judío creyente en Jesús, enseña pasionalmente las verdades sinérgicas entre la Biblia Hebrea (el Viejo Testamento) y el Nuevo Testament.

programme.title: Ministry Now
programme.desc: La familia Lamb lleva a los espectadores de todo el mundo a Ministry Now. Lleno de fe radical, declaraciones alentadoras y consejos positivos.

programme.title: Adoración en casa
programme.desc: Transforme la atmósfera de lo que sea que esté enfrentando a través del poder de la adoración con Josh Morales.

programme.title: Impactando las Naciones
programme.desc: En Impactando Naciones, la Pastora Wanda Rolón comparte mensajes de fe, esperanza y poder espiritual para transformar vidas, familias y comunidades.

programme.desc: Rejoice and relax in the splendor of the glorious Sun for a full hour, with this new video by David Huting.

programme.desc: An immersion into turquoise waters and a rocky coastline in Bali, Indonesia.

programme.title: Green Bowl Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escaping to a secluded beach in Bali where the lapping waves on the rocky shore soothe souls.

programme.desc: Vibrant underwater reefs, including many scenes which no longer look as depicted due to coral bleaching.

programme.title: Lost in Paradise
programme.desc: A tropical island paradise to relax in. A one hour long high definition nature experience of two different remote islands hidden in the south Pacific.

programme.title: Rugged Beach: Hawaii
programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore and the sky brightens with gorgeous hues.

programme.title: Snake Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Flying away to paradise and exploring the lush forests and turquoise waters of Snake Island, in the Philippines.

programme.title: Tranquil Tide: Ca'te d'Azur
programme.desc: The medieval town of Menton on the French Côte d'Azur, where the sun glistens on iridescent water.

programme.title: Flying Over Greece
programme.desc: Journey through the landscapes of Greece from a bird's-eye-view.

programme.title: Shimizu Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Relax to the serene beauty of the turquoise waters that surround the rocky coast of Shimizu Island in the Philippines.

programme.title: Ulun Danu Temple: Indonesia
programme.desc: Feel the tranquility of an ancient temple and the serene views of its surrounding waters.

programme.title: Coral Kingdom
programme.desc: Arrangements of colorful coral sway to the rhythm of the tide, with aquatic visitors stopping by to enjoy the scenery.

programme.title: Ruby Beach Sunset
programme.desc: Relax for a full hour as a golden, soothing sunset slowly unfolds and turns to dusk as seen from Ruby Beach, on Washington state's Olympic Peninsula; you'll be lulled into a state of tranquil relaxation thanks to the sounds of rhythmic ocean waves gently crashing over the pebbly beach paired with the dazzling collage of four different sunset scenes shot in 4K.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: A visual and audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. 60 different one-minute scenes of nature, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: An aerial journey to the remote fjords and valleys of eastern Iceland.

programme.title: Kerikeri: New Zealand
programme.desc: Traveling to northern New Zealand and beholding the vivid green vegetation.

programme.title: Scenes From a Creek
programme.desc: Rapids and stillness of a lively creek; rushing waters covering rocky dams as they continue down a meandering waterway.

programme.title: Rotorua Lakes: New Zealand
programme.desc: The calm waters, forests and blue skies of New Zealand's Rotorua Lakes.

programme.title: Wharariki Beach I: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring the sandy shores and rocky cliffs of a majestic beach in New Zealand.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego
programme.desc: Featuring 12 different 15-minute scenes from the San Diego's beaches, Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines and more.

programme.title: Ditaytayan Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Taking a look at Ditaytayan Island in the Philippines, from bird's-eye views of the coast to close-ups of the waves lapping on the shores.

programme.title: Hawaii Beaches: Oahu 2
programme.desc: Escaping to the sandy solitudes of Hawaii's tropical beaches.

programme.title: Chemin Pealey: Îles de la Madeleine
programme.desc: Admiring the tranquility of water.

programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: The thrilling view of a cliff-top lookout of one of Indonesia's most breathtaking spots.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Admiring the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay at Newfoundland's Amherst Cove.

programme.title: Lush Waterfalls: Hawaii
programme.desc: A tranquil moment at Hawaii's stunning Hana Waterfalls will renew your spirit.

programme.title: Tropical Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: A view of Playa Madama, an unspoiled beach framed by high bluffs at the edge of the Dominican Republic.

programme.title: Snake Island: Philippines
programme.desc: Flying away to paradise and exploring the lush forests and turquoise waters of Snake Island, in the Philippines.

programme.title: Sparkling Californian Coast -- California Coast, U.S.
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the view of sparkling waves crashing over the California coast.

programme.title: A Day in the Caribbean
programme.desc: The tropical island of Antigua.

programme.title: Tropical Bay: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Exploring an iridescent blue bay on the Dominican Republic's Playa Rincón.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: Whats On Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music. From Malta high energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy cutting edge Limbo Festival, Spain forward thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Malini Egypt
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Egypt for the first time, exploring Cairo and the Pyramids of Giza. Beyond the headlines and common tourist warnings, she discovers unexpected warmth, culture, and a different side to these iconic places.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Milan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Milan, in northern Italy’s Lombardy region. Known for its chic style, stunning architecture, delicious food, and world-class art, Milan stands out as one of Europe’s most fashionable and sophisticated cities.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.title: The Odyssey Sirens Song
programme.desc: On his journey, Odysseus resists the Sirens' deadly song by having his crew block their ears and tying himself to the ship's mast.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Luisi Malofeev Torino 2021
programme.desc: ​In May 2021, pianist Alexander Malofeev joined conductor Fabio Luisi and the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai for a performance at Turin's Auditorium RAI Arturo Toscanini. The program featured Franz Liszt's Piano Concerto No. 1 in E-flat major and Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 6 in B minor, "Pathétique." Malofeev's interpretation of Liszt's concerto was particularly noted for its expressive depth and technical prowess.​

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Florence
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Florence, the heart of Tuscany and birthplace of the Renaissance. She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Naples is Italy in the extreme. We’ll prowl backstreet fish markets and dodge speedy Vespas before indulging in pizza where it was invented. Afterward, we'll climb to the top of nearby Mount Vesuvius, then wander through the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman town it destroyed.

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Azzurro Storie di mare: Alla scoperta di Ischia, isola verde
programme.desc: A journey along Italy’s coast, from Ponza to Calabria, exploring its natural beauty and the people who protect it. Fishermen, divers, and activists share their passion for the sea and their fight against pollution.

programme.title: Med Destinations Lake Bled
programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Athens
programme.desc: Malini explores the ancient city of Athens, Greece. Once steeped in history, Athens has experienced a modern rebirth, now thriving with creativity, modern Greek gastronomy, a vibrant contemporary art scene, and unmatched nightlife.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Valerio uncovers a shocking truth that deepens the mystery of Ettore’s death. He discovers a conspiracy involving powerful figures, forcing him into a dangerous phase of his investigation. Determined to expose the truth, Valerio faces formidable obstacles that threaten to silence him.

programme.title: Quella cosa che non si scorda mai
programme.desc: Francesco's supermarket is in great crisis and Olivia involves the man in a rescue plan that leads them to search for local producers around Gorizia. Viola is increasingly determined to investigate her mother's past to find out who her father is and Emma is increasingly interested in Nice.

programme.title: The Odyssey Zeus Punishment
programme.desc: As punishment for his crew eating the sacred cattle of Helios, Zeus unleashes a mighty storm that destroys Ulysses’ ship, leaving him as the sole survivor adrift at sea.

programme.title: PUCCINI TU TU PICCOLO ADDIO
programme.desc: In the final moments of Madama Butterfly, Cio-Cio-San sings "Tu, tu, piccolo Iddio", a tender farewell to her son before making the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Marseille
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Marseille, France’s vibrant Mediterranean port city. She explores its historic Old Port, colorful neighborhoods, and bustling markets, discovering the city’s unique blend of French and North African influences. From sampling local dishes like bouillabaisse to soaking in seaside views and street art, Malini uncovers what makes Marseille one of France’s most dynamic and diverse cities.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Enjoy the ultimate comfort meal with beer-battered fish fillets, fried to perfection, followed by a bright and colorful Niçoise salad filled with tuna, eggs, tomatoes, olives, and green beans.

programme.title: Whats On Waves and Rhythms
programme.desc: From seaside beats to floating stages, this episode captures Mediterranean music by the water. Malta Boomerang Festival and Earth Garden celebrate eco conscious music and arts, while Spain Bilbao BBK fuses urban culture with live performances. Set sail on the Mediterranea Metal Cruise, a unique floating festival, and enjoy Malta iconic Jazz Festival with historic and coastal backdrops. The Mediterranean truly comes alive where music meets the waves.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Celebrate rustic baking in this episode, starting with a flavorful olive pie cake and finishing with charming mini olive pies sprinkled with sesame seeds, perfect for sharing or snacking.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We'll explore flamboyant Sevilla, where orange trees ring lacy palaces, bullfighting is still a cultural event, and little girls dream of growing up to become flamenco dancers.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Building for Centuries Panel
programme.desc: What does it take to build something that lasts centuries? This panel examines how sustainability, environmental awareness, and long-term thinking are reshaping architecture and development, moving beyond short-term solutions toward a legacy of resilient, future-proof spaces.

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: Acqua da proteggere
programme.desc: With Marco Faimali, director of the CNR's Institute for the Study of Marine Sustainability, we explore the ocean's fragile ecosystem and the need for protection. Anna Pancaldi visits marine protected areas, including the Smart Bay of Santa Teresa and the port of La Spezia, where researchers study "alien species". Finally, we learn about the underwater internet, an innovation from Sapienza University of Rome led by Professor Chiara Petrioli and the WSENSE team.

programme.title: MED Destination LJUBLJANA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bengal has not only been home to the former capital of British India but also been the land where many European colonies vied for dominance and cultural supremacy. As a result, the cuisine of the land underwent a renaissance, wherein it imbibed many European influences including Portuguese, Dutch and Danish. Alex visits what used to be a Danish settlement on the banks of the river Hooghly, and she unearths recipes, which were born from this delicious amalgamation of cultures.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Sukhmani explores Siem Reap, starting with Angkor Wat, a maze of broken columns and statues. She then visits Ta Prohm and then Angkor Thom.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, including its local market, and tries local food and wine. Her next stop is Jaffa exploring its flea market ending with Shakshuka Shushka.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Considering Singapore’s reputation as a glitzy, fast-paced, ultra-urbanized city, Sukhmani is surprised at the pockets of nature it offers.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: The pillowy goodness of Bengali sweets is even more famous in India than some of Kolkata’s landmarks. Alex, however, sets out to discover the forgotten sweets of Bengal. She meets some veteran sweet shop owners in the city, who show her how to make some lesser-known traditional sweets.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: In the 8th century AD, a town on the Coromandel coast became a lab for the kings of the Pallava dynasty to conduct their architectural experiments. Centuries later, Alex visits the world-famous rock-cut temples and cave shrines of Mahabalipuram to explore the styles of architecture that were innovated by kings, who are often called the pioneers of South Indian architecture.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Travel along with Sukhmani to Cambodia, the land of eternal sunshine and hope, as she explores Siem Reap, the city of Angkor.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain and then Jaffa Port. She then explores National Park in Caesarea. Ending the episode as learns about Baha'i faith.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Khad Maas is a celebrated Rajasthani dish with war-time origins. Game meat used to be slow-cooked in underground pits created to ensure that the fire could not be seen by enemy troops. Due to its intricate and cumbersome preparation, the dish seldom graces tables in Rajasthan today. Alex learns how to prepare this with the cultural conservationist, Trivikram.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: From Siem Reap to Sihanoukville, the next adventurous stop where food means spiders, crickets and cockroaches.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: From an exciting jungle breakfast to a magical Night Safari, Sukhmani’s experiences at the Singapore Zoo make her fall in love with wildlife.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex takes a trip to Thanjavur, curious about why it has always been called “the cradle of arts”. Soon, she is lost in the magnificence of the Great Living Chola Temples, with their stunning architecture and intricate carvings, rich in symbolism. At a center for making bronze statues, she is surprised to find out how ancient is the art form. The highlight of her trip, however, is a visit to a workshop for making musical instruments, where she is treated to an impromptu performance.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre, starting from El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. Next day she travels to Mizpe Hayamim and then explores the town of Capernaum.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Khad Maas is a celebrated Rajasthani dish with war-time origins. Game meat used to be slow-cooked in underground pits created to ensure that the fire could not be seen by enemy troops. Due to its intricate and cumbersome preparation, the dish seldom graces tables in Rajasthan today. Alex learns how to prepare this with the cultural conservationist, Trivikram.

programme.desc: From Siem Reap to Sihanoukville, the next adventurous stop where food means spiders, crickets and cockroaches.

programme.desc: From an exciting jungle breakfast to a magical Night Safari, Sukhmani’s experiences at the Singapore Zoo make her fall in love with wildlife.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre, starting from El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. Next day she travels to Mizpe Hayamim and then explores the town of Capernaum.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: In the heritage lanes of the mediterranean island, buried in the depths of time, are the archaeological sites of Cyprus. Be it Khirokitia, one of the most significant Neolithic settlements of Cyprus, Paphos, a mysterious city with Greek influences, or the vibrant splashes in the churches constructed during the Byzantine rule - Cyprus is rich in its heritage.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Ein Gedi oasis and Masada plateau on her way to Eilat, where she visits the beaches, Red Canyon and Wadi Shani.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharaja's Express
programme.desc: Rohit and Manasi are on the Maharajas’ Express. Their first destination is Udaipur, where they bump into an old friend who knows all their secrets.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: During her travels across Tamil Nadu, Alex finally reaches one of India’s most famous pilgrimage sites – Madurai. She pays her respects at the nerve center of the city – the Meenakshi Amman Temple. Her exploration of Madurai reveals to her, however, that there is another, rather delightful side to this revered city.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Alex visits Karni Fort and Fort Begu in Rajasthan, where she unearths some prized dishes of the nobilities.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Shirodhara is a traditional Ayurvedic oil drip treatment that popular world traveler, Jamie Srubis tries at the Mines Wellness Resort in Malaysia. Following this, she tries other treatments such as Urut Melayu, a full body massage which derives its technique from a traditional Malay martial art, and Acupuncture and Moxibustion, the two oldest treatments of Traditional Chinese Medicine.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: The rise of Buddhism in India can be traced from famous monuments such as the Mahabodhi temple complex and the Great Stupa at Sanchi.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: From Antoni Gaudi’s whims to hosting the 1992 Olympics, Alex finds out that Barcelona has been shaped by many different things.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharaja's Express
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: A town defined by medieval grandeur, Karaikudi transports Alex to the era when affluent Chettiar merchants built splendid mansions as a status symbol. At one of these mansions, the secrets of the Chettinad cuisine, heavy on meat and heat, begin to unfold.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Hungry for stories and flavours of a bygone kingdom, Alex meets Rana Sawai Harisingh II, the 24th descendant to the royal family of Begu.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Despite the boom of the 21st century development, Tallinn, the 1000-year-old capital of Estonia, safeguards its UNESCO-listed medieval Old Town, one of Europe’s most complete walled cities. Marco Biagioli and Erica Melargo, a famous Italian nomad couple, lose themselves in its fairy-tale charms, and find out its legends. They also visit iconic attractions such as Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and Raeapteek, the oldest pharmacy in Europe that has continuously been in business in the same building.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Israel and first explores Sarona, including its local market, and tries local food and wine. Her next stop is Jaffa exploring its flea market ending with Shakshuka Shushka.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Sukhmani explores Siem Reap, starting with Angkor Wat, a maze of broken columns and statues. She then visits Ta Prohm and then Angkor Thom.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex is introduced to Tamil Nadu through the state capital, Chennai. A colonial-era cathedral that she visits turns out to be one of the only three known churches in the world built over the tomb of an apostle of Jesus. She also finds out that a museum dedicated to the life of a saint was once used by an American businessman to store ice. She soon realizes that the city is full of hidden stories waiting to be explored.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Bengal has not only been home to the former capital of British India but also been the land where many European colonies vied for dominance and cultural supremacy. As a result, the cuisine of the land underwent a renaissance, wherein it imbibed many European influences including Portuguese, Dutch and Danish. Alex visits what used to be a Danish settlement on the banks of the river Hooghly, and she unearths recipes, which were born from this delicious amalgamation of cultures.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in the Seychelles, Freishia finds out that every island has something unique to offer.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Tallinn, Estonia’s capital, is known for its quaint, medieval Old Town but Italian nomad couple, Marco and Erica discover other sides to the city by visiting offbeat attractions such as the Seaplane Harbour Museum and Telliskivi Creative City, a hub of artists. They also tuck into a medieval feast at Olde Hansa Inn. Following this, they have an off-roading adventure at Aidu oil shale quarry.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Zodiac fountain and then Jaffa Port. She then explores National Park in Caesarea. Ending the episode as learns about Baha'i faith.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Travel along with Sukhmani to Cambodia, the land of eternal sunshine and hope, as she explores Siem Reap, the city of Angkor.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: In the 8th century AD, a town on the Coromandel coast became a lab for the kings of the Pallava dynasty to conduct their architectural experiments. Centuries later, Alex visits the world-famous rock-cut temples and cave shrines of Mahabalipuram to explore the styles of architecture that were innovated by kings, who are often called the pioneers of South Indian architecture.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: The pillowy goodness of Bengali sweets is even more famous in India than some of Kolkata’s landmarks. Alex, however, sets out to discover the forgotten sweets of Bengal. She meets some veteran sweet shop owners in the city, who show her how to make some lesser-known traditional sweets.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Considering Singapore’s reputation as a glitzy, fast-paced, ultra-urbanized city, Sukhmani is surprised at the pockets of nature it offers.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Marco and Erica get to know about the dark history of Estonia while exploring the remains of Narva, the country’s third largest city at its easternmost limit. From the fortress of Narva and the bastions of Narva to an abandoned textile mill, everything tells them about the intriguing story of the town. They also learn about the Russian and ‘alien’ people living here.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina visits Acre, starting from El Jazzar mosque and Citadel fortress. Next day she travels to Mizpe Hayamim and then explores the town of Capernaum.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: From Siem Reap to Sihanoukville, the next adventurous stop where food means spiders, crickets and cockroaches.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Alex takes a trip to Thanjavur, curious about why it has always been called “the cradle of arts”. Soon, she is lost in the magnificence of the Great Living Chola Temples, with their stunning architecture and intricate carvings, rich in symbolism. At a center for making bronze statues, she is surprised to find out how ancient is the art form. The highlight of her trip, however, is a visit to a workshop for making musical instruments, where she is treated to an impromptu performance.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Khad Maas is a celebrated Rajasthani dish with war-time origins. Game meat used to be slow-cooked in underground pits created to ensure that the fire could not be seen by enemy troops. Due to its intricate and cumbersome preparation, the dish seldom graces tables in Rajasthan today. Alex learns how to prepare this with the cultural conservationist, Trivikram.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: From an exciting jungle breakfast to a magical Night Safari, Sukhmani’s experiences at the Singapore Zoo make her fall in love with wildlife.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Marco and Erica soak in the vitality of the student town, Tartu, and experience its eccentricities at the Leaning House and the AHHAA Science Centre. Following this, they visit Obinista, the cultural centre of Setomaa, where the Seto community introduces them to the traditional ways of dressing, singing and dancing. They also indulge in a traditional smoke sauna at nearby Võromaa.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina is in Tiberias, known for its natural hot springs, here she visits the Sea of Galilee. In Nezareth she visits the cave of Mary, ending with Via Dolorosa in Jerusalem.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: Explore the beauty of the peaceful Kohrong island of Cambodia in the wilderness of the Mangroves and the relaxing trip back to Sihanoukville.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Ooty has been known to charm visitors ever since British officers used to go there to escape the infamous Indian summer. Sipping tea at the tiered tea plantations, strolling by serene lakes and gushing waterfalls, gawking at gentle deer and majestic elephants at Mudumalai National Park, Alex loses herself in the breathtaking natural beauty of this retreat nestled in the Nilgiri hills.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: The sheer ingenuity and artistry of Rajasthani cuisine is an enduring testament to the skill and grim determination of the people who have made their homes in this largely arid land. Alex finds out that this applies to the imperial cuisine of the state as well, when she meets Trivikram and learns from him how to prepare a traditional meat dish, that was made using meat leftovers.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From swimming in the ocean to relishing a traditional Maldivian lobster curry, Kim experiences the true meaning of joie de vivre at Reethi Rah.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: After finding his grandparents’ handwritten recipes, Vikramaditya Sodawas, the owner of Karni Fort, decided to revive his family’s prized recipes.

programme.title: Xplore
programme.desc: So far Cambodia has been seasoned with adventure, local spice and colour, now encounter ancient history of the country at the Angkor Complex.

programme.title: 10 Days Estonia
programme.desc: Embracing Estonia’s largest area of swamps, meadows and waterside forests, Soomaa National Park is the second largest national park in the country. While trying out bog walking and camping over here, Marco and Erica experience what is known as the “fifth season” in Estonia, the season of floods. They also explore Tallinn’s history with espionage, and go on to soak in the romance at its Christmas Market.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Located in the North Malé Atoll of Maldives, the Reethi Rah resort is the perfect combination of island life mixed with world-class luxury.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: Kodaikanal - the name means “The Gift of the Forest”. True to its name, the cozy hill station nestled in Tamil Nadu’s Palani Hills is captivating with its verdant hills, cascading waterfalls, and postcard-perfect lakes. Alex is truly astonished, however, when she stumbles onto an observatory here that has been tracking solar activity for around 115 years!

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sabrina in Jerusalem, takes a guided tour of City of David and visits Western Wall, learning about its significance. Ending with Cardo and Mahane Yehuda Markets.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: After finding his grandparents’ handwritten recipes, Vikramaditya Sodawas, the owner of Karni Fort, decided to revive his family’s prized recipes.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Hungry for stories and flavours of a bygone kingdom, Alex meets Rana Sawai Harisingh II, the 24th descendant to the royal family of Begu.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: The rise of Buddhism in India can be traced from famous monuments such as the Mahabodhi temple complex and the Great Stupa at Sanchi.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: From Antoni Gaudi’s whims to hosting the 1992 Olympics, Alex finds out that Barcelona has been shaped by many different things.

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Roy on the Maharaja's Express
programme.desc: On a trip aboard the Maharajas’ Express, Rohit and Manasi find themselves taking a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Timeless Tamil Nadu
programme.desc: A town defined by medieval grandeur, Karaikudi transports Alex to the era when affluent Chettiar merchants built splendid mansions as a status symbol. At one of these mansions, the secrets of the Chettinad cuisine, heavy on meat and heat, begin to unfold.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante toscano "Pepolino" dove prepara delle saporite ricette con lo chef Patrizio, per chiudere in "Dolcezza e Bellezza" Enzo prepara una delle cheese cake piu` famose di New York.(2007).

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più eleganti di Manhattan a due passi da Central Park il "San Domenico ristorante". Nella cucina del ristorante Ornella assiste Odette Fada nella preparazione dei classici piatti Italiani. Ospite della puntata la giovane stilista Nicole Romano. Ornella Fado indossa alcune creazioni della sua collezione. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Joe e Marco Chirico, al nuovo Marco Polo ristorante, il ristorante è stato appena ristrutturato ed ha un look fresco e moderno. Oltre a preparare le ricette del nuovo menù, Ornella prepara una ricetta con un ospite speciale, Monsignor Jamie Gigantiello, Monsignore Gigantiello prepara la ricetta della nonna, polpette di melenzane. Nel ristorante accanto Chef Marco prepara sfizi per i fan di Brindiamo! tra cui una pizza degli spiedini e un super cocktail. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita uno dei nuovi trendy ristoranti nel Village in New York City." Rafele" ristorante. Ornella e Chef Raffaele Ronca, prima di iniziare il loro viaggio culinario, fanno shopping al "Green market"a Union Square. Oltre a preparare ricette tipiche Napoletane,lo chef preprara alcune ricette con ingredienti Calabresi e per concludere in dolcezza e Bellezza prepara una sua super specialità la famosa torta di ricotta una delle "Cheese cake' più famose di New York. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante Angelina's on the Water per conoscere il nuovo chef Matteo Calciati, oltre a preparare le ricette del nuovo menù del ristorante Ornella vi apre le porte dell' esclusivo Gala annuale che presenta per la NOIAW ( National Organizazion Italian American Woman) dove intervista il simpatico e frizzante Dott. OZ. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita "Amo" ristorante, che si trova nel museo Amo di Verona. Con lo chef Vincenzo Buonocore, Ornella prepara alcune ricette fuori menù, e insieme al sommelier Niccolò Petrilli, scelgono il vino perfetto per ogni piatto. Visita alcune delle cantine più interessanti del territorio ed intervista il vice sindaco della città di Verona Dott. Stefano Casali. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita nuovamente "Luzzo Pizzeria" per fare una chiaccherata con Michele Iuliano. Michele e` un pizzaiolo napoletano proprietario di diversi ristoranti in New York, Michele è anche ideatore di un piccolo forno itinerante. Oltre a preparare delle pizze classiche nel forno tradizionale, Michele prepara delle pizze nel suo nuovo forno su ruote, di fronte al suo ristorante.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: cono di stesa, venere nera, e babà al bergamotto. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introuce il suo amico Geniale Marco Napoli, attore e regista televisivo e cinematografico. Il documentario di oggi vede come protagonista una giovane artista catanese Roberta Finocchiaro "Save lives with the Rhytm.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Raffaele Trovato, direttore dell'IFSE, a Piobesi Torinese, oltre a visitare la bellissima scuola, Ornella prepara delle ricette con l'istruttore del centro.(2009)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Raffaele Trovato, direttore dell'IFSE, a Piobesi Torinese, oltre a visitare la bellissima scuola, Ornella prepara delle ricette con l'istruttore del centro.(2009)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Tartufo" a Manayunk, poco distante da Filadelfia, dove incontra Al Del Bello, per preparare alcune ricette tipiche del ristorante. In questa puntata Ornella indossa i guanti da boxer per correre come Rocky Balboa sulla scalinata del museo d'arte di Filadelfia. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Al Del Bello al suo ristorante "Il Portico", uno dei ristoranti più raffinati di Filadelfia. Al racconta la sua storia di gratidudine nei confronti della famiglia Lattanzi proprietari di ristoratori italiani a New York. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Heinz Beck, chef stellato del ristorante "La Pergola" di Roma. Heinz racconta l'inizio della sua carriera e spiega la sua visione della cucina italiana.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Piero Muscari intervista Cesare Berlingeri, noto artista contemporaneo italiano. Cesare illustra l'importanza della sua arte e cosa vuole esprimere con la tecnica dei quadri piegati.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado presenta il lavoro artistico della sua amica Geniale,Paola Sinisgalli fondatrice della "Creative Shakes" il lavoro artistico di oggi e` un corto che vede Paola nei panni di regista.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Sergio Furnari, e presenta un docuemntario su un suo ultimo lavoro aritistico "Covid Hero Monument"

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Frank Gullo al suo stabilimento "Gullo Seafood" per scoprire i segreti di un polpo perfetto, per poi andare con Mr.Octoman a preparare alcune ricette in due ristoranti a New York, "Perla" e "Quality Italian". (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, si trova a Milano e visita uno storico ristorante stellato, "Aimo e Nadia", dove incontra ed intervista Stefania Moroni figlia della signora Nadia ed il signor Aimo. Nella bellissima cucina Ornella incontra due bravissimi chef come Fabio Pisani e Alessandro Negrini. Insieme preparano alcuni piatti classici del menù del ristorante di Aimo e Nadia.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Nel 2015 Ornella Fado ha celebrato 10 anni di produzione televisiva e di messa in onda su NYC LIFE, il canale pubblico di New York. Questa puntata raccoglie alcuni dei momenti più belli del programma televisivo Brindiamo!

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Continua il viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! nella seconda parte Ornella viene presentata dal famoso conduttore televisio della WB 11, Howard Thompson grande fan di Brindiamo! Nella prima parte della puntata, Ornella visita il ristorante "Il Baluardo" nella regione Piemonte dove incontra lo chef Marc Lanteri. A Central Park, Ornella intervista la bellissima Barbara D'Urso e rivivono le emozioni del party " La dolce Vita" dove Barbara era l'ospite d'onore con Lee Curreri.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Siamo alla terza ed ultima parte del viaggio dei 10 anni di Brindiamo! Prima tappa Montreal. Ornella visita il mercato Jean -Talon con Aldo, per poi andare da "Vinizza" per preparare alcune pizze.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a St. George's Island, nelle Bermuda per filmare due favolosi episodi di Brindiamo! In questa prima puntata Ornella é in cucina con chef Michele Belotti e prepara alcune ricette per l'evento "Italian Night in Bermuda" che si terrà al St. George's Club.L'evento presentato da Ursula Avella, presidente della "Great Culinary Minds" e` stato un grande successo. (2015)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. Al racconta la sua storia di gratidudine nei confronti della famiglia Lattanzi proprietari di ristoratori italiani a New York. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è a Milano, all'EXPO, con i giovani della Basilicata del progetto Sano è Lucano. I prodotti tipici lucani ispirano una serie di incontri culinari: dalla barca alla Mondadori, fino a Lady Bu Bistrò e al ristorante stellato Il Luogo di Aimo e Nadia con lo chef Fabio Pisani.Il racconto è arricchito dagli interventi di Sara Farnetti e Pietro Bitonti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado

A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Baluardo" dove incontra lo chef Marc Lanteri e la Sommelier Amy Belotti. Il Baluardo si trova a Mondoví una cittadina a circa 80 chilomentri da Torino. Con Chef Marc Lanteri Ornella prepara delle ricette tipiche del territorio e davanti ad un buon bicchiere di vino, Amy le racconta del successo del ristorante e la sua vita di americana in Italia. (2012)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel cuore di New York e visita una pizzeria super chic dal nome PizzArte. Oltre a preparare delle fantastiche pizze, con il pizzaiolo appena arrivato dall' italia, Ornella e lo chef preparano anche alcuni piatti tradizionali campani.Ornella intervista il proprietario del ristorante, l'avvocato Bruno Cilio appassionato di cucina e di arte.(2013)

programme.title: BrindiamoS3
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più sofisticati di New York City, "SD26", la versione moderna del classico San Domenico. Oltre a preparare le ricette con lo chef Matteo Bergamini, intervista il famoso ristoratore Tony May e la figlia Marisa May parlando dei segreti del successo di questo nuovo ristorante: Tra gli ospiti di eccellenza, Ornella intervista Massimo Vignelli il talentuoso designer italiano conosciuto in tutto il mondo per la sua genialità. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado, si trova a Milano e visita uno storico ristorante stellato, "Aimo e Nadia", dove incontra ed intervista Stefania Moroni figlia della signora Nadia ed il signor Aimo. Nella bellissima cucina Ornella incontra due bravissimi chef come Fabio Pisani e Alessandro Negrini. Insieme preparano alcuni piatti classici del menù del ristorante di Aimo e Nadia.
